name: Mathare River Riparian Reserve Enforcement
blocking_factor: Land tenure disputes and political resistance from settlement landlords
notes: Riparian reserve (30m) consistently violated. Enforcement requires evictions that county avoids pre-election.

name: Nairobi River Basin Drainage Master Plan
blocking_factor: Budget absorption capacity and contractor defaults
notes: Phase 1 complete. Phase 2 (Mathare-Ngong corridor) stalled since 2019.

name: Integrated Urban Flood Early Warning System
blocking_factor: Inter-agency coordination failure between KMD and NCC
notes: MOU between KMD and NCC never signed. System designed but not procured.

name: Mukuru Special Planning Area Drainage
notes: SPA approved 2020. Drainage component requires resettlement — underfunded by 60%.

name: Riparian Land Title Regularisation
blocking_factor: Political will — riparian land has high commercial value
notes: Process began 2017. Stalled after 2017 election. High-value riparian plots obstructing enforcement.

name: Nairobi Stormwater Utility (Revenue Model)
blocking_factor: Revenue model not approved by County Assembly
notes: Feasibility study complete. County Assembly rejected user charge component twice.

name: Climate-Resilient Building Code Amendments
notes: Codes updated 2021. Enforcement on new builds improving. Existing stock unaddressed.

name: Kibera Ngong River Flood Bunds
notes: Design complete. Construction halted 2019 after resettlement protests.

name: Community Flood Warden Programme
blocking_factor: Volunteer attrition and stipend funding gaps
notes: Active in 12 of 32 targeted wards. High-risk Mathare and Korogocho wards not covered.

name: Nairobi Green Infrastructure Strategy
blocking_factor: Awaiting County Integrated Development Plan revision
notes: Strategy drafted. Not yet integrated into CIDP. No budget line.
